response.original_title: JUJUTSU KAISEN: The Real 4-D — Clock Tower of Recurrence
response.overview: A series of mysterious disappearances leads to a decrepit, old Western-style mansion shrouded in an eerie aura. Stepping into the role of a rookie Assistant Manager, you are tasked with supporting Tokyo Jujutsu High first-year students Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Nobara Kugisaki on a dangerous investigation. As a fierce battle against a massive, swirling cursed spirit erupts, the young sorcerers must unleash their cursed techniques alongside unexpected allies—including high school-aged versions of Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto. Can they overcome a curse that mirrors a threat defeated twelve years ago, or will they be trapped by the clock tower's recurrence?  An original, immersive 4D theater attraction produced exclusively for Universal Studios Japan.
response.title: JUJUTSU KAISEN: The Real 4-D — Clock Tower of Recurrence
